advertised_items.creative_notes: A/B Test: Bright, sunny imagery. Focus on portability and long battery life.
advertised_items.description: Perfect for beach trips, hikes, and backyard BBQs. Experience crystal-clear audio with deep bass and all-day battery life.
advertised_items.name: AquaBeat Portable Speaker
advertised_items.tagline: Unleash the sound of summer. Waterproof. Wireless. Worry-free.

advertised_items.creative_notes: Targeting WFH professionals. Use a split-screen video: half showing a messy desk, half showing the clean setup with the hub.
advertised_items.description: Streamline your workstation with the 7-in-1 Ultra Hub. Connect your monitor, hard drive, keyboard, and more with just one USB-C cable. Say goodbye to cable clutter.
advertised_items.name: Ultra Hub Pro 7-in-1
advertised_items.tagline: The only cable you'll ever need. Power, ports, and simplicity.

advertised_items.creative_notes: Focus on the 'natural' and 'organic' aspects. Use a testimonial image of a user with glowing skin. Emphasize the limited-time 20% off offer.
advertised_items.description: Our best-selling night cream, now with a new organic Lavender infusion. Hydrates, repairs, and smooths fine lines while you sleep. Suitable for all skin types.
advertised_items.name: Renewal Lavender Night Cream
advertised_items.tagline: Wake up to radiant skin. 20% off for a limited time!
